name: Fideo Ancho
recipeIngredient: queso anejo (aged cheese), avocado, quartered limes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chiles in a bowl of water and bring to a simmer. Simmer for five minutes or until soft.
2. Pour 1/4 cup of chicken stock into a blender. Add cloves, garlic, and cumin seeds. Blend until smooth. Season with salt. Add one more cup of stock and the drained chiles. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil in a large heavy saucepan. Add pasta and toss to cook until golden brown.
4. Add blended ingredients to pasta and continue tossing for three minutes, scraping the pan to prevent sticking.
5. Reduce heat to low and cook until pasta is al dente (5-8 minutes).
6. Serve in bowls with avocado, cheese, and lime juice sprinkled on top.
